description: Hosts create, edit, and manage property listings. Listings include title, description, location (address geocoded to latitude/longitude), price, and availability dates. Hosts can upload up to 6 photos per listing stored in cloud object storage. Only the host who created a listing can modify or delete it.
functional_requirements: As a host, I can create a new property listing with title, description, address, price, and availability dates; the address is geocoded to latitude and longitude using Google Maps Geocoding API
As a host, I can upload up to 6 photos for my listing; photos are stored in Google Cloud Storage and the listing stores the resulting public URLs
As a host, I can edit or delete my own listings; other users receive a 403 if they attempt to modify my listing
As any user, I can view the details of a specific listing by its ID, including its photos and coordinates
non_functional_requirements: Create, update, and delete listing endpoints require JWT authentication
Only the host who created a listing can modify or delete it
Listing coordinates (latitude, longitude) are stored as a PostGIS Point geometry using Hibernate Spatial
Photo upload accepts multipart/form-data; each image is stored as a separate GCS object
